defect: For months whose mean wet-day count per block was below one, the v2 implementation divided uniform aggregate bin and descriptor numerators by one rather than by the actual positive aggregate wet-day denominator. Uniform weights therefore failed constraints whose declared authority was those same uniform weights.
invalidated_outcome: The complete v2 execution is retained but excluded from the A5d1 decision because its uniform-reference formulas did not implement the frozen ratio semantics.
reason: A reference ratio must use numerator sum divided by its actual positive denominator sum. The correction fails closed if that denominator is zero and makes no discretionary scientific change.
